message.content:
@startuml
actor Program

participant "V4L2" as V4L2
participant "Bridge CX3" as BridgeCX3
participant "Camera OV5640" as CameraOV5640

== Initialization ==

Program -> V4L2 : 1 OpenDevice(/dev/video0)
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 2
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 3
CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3 : 4
BridgeCX3 --> V4L2 : 5
V4L2 --> Program : 6
Program -> V4L2 : 7 InitDevice()
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 8
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 9
CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3 : 10
BridgeCX3 --> V4L2 : 11
V4L2 --> Program : 12

== Test ==

Program -> V4L2 : 13 SetParameter(valueA)
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 14 valueA
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 15 valueA
CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3 : 16
BridgeCX3 --> V4L2 : 17
V4L2 --> Program : 18
Program -> V4L2 : 19 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 20
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 21
CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3 : 22 value
BridgeCX3 --> V4L2 : 23 value
note left : value must be equal to ValueA
V4L2 --> Program : 24 value
Program -> V4L2 : 25 StartStream()
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 26
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 27
CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3 : 28
BridgeCX3 --> V4L2 : 29
V4L2 --> Program : 30
Program -> V4L2 : 31 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 32
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 33
CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3 : 34 value
BridgeCX3 --> V4L2 : 35 value
note left : value must be equal to ValueA
V4L2 --> Program : 36 value
Program -> V4L2 : 37 SetParameter(valueB)
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 38 valueB
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 39 valueB
CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3 : 40
BridgeCX3 --> V4L2 : 41
V4L2 --> Program : 42
Program -> V4L2 : 43 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 44
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 45
CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3 : 46 value
BridgeCX3 --> V4L2 : 47 value
note left : value must be equal to ValueB
V4L2 --> Program : 48 value
Program -> V4L2 : 49 StopStream()
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 50
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 51
CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3 : 52
BridgeCX3 --> V4L2 : 53
V4L2 --> Program : 54
Program -> V4L2 : 55 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 56
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 57
CameraOV5640 --> BridgeCX3 : 58 value
BridgeCX3 --> V4L2 : 59 value
note left : value must be equal to ValueB
V4L2 --> Program : 60 value

== Destruction ==

Program -> V4L2 : 61 CloseDevice()
V4L2 -> BridgeCX3 : 62
BridgeCX3 -> CameraOV5640 : 63
CameraOV5640 -->x BridgeCX3 : 64
BridgeCX3 -->x V4L2 : 65
V4L2 -->x Program : 66

@enduml
